title: Add Ask PollinationsAI for a Text to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: PowerShell meets the hive
gist.blurb: A new community integration brings Pollinations text generation straight to PowerShell. Perfect for wiring up AI into your .NET apps and Azure workflows without breaking a sweat.
gist.summary: Added a new community integration that enables text generation via Pollinations using PowerShell, designed for .NET and Azure environments.
gist.impact: Windows developers can now easily pipe Pollinations text generation directly into their PowerShell scripts and Azure workflows.
gist.visual_concept: PowerShell/Windows/Azure themes. A blue terminal or a classic Windows-style window. The bee mascot (Polly) wearing a tiny sysadmin tie or holding a scripting manual, interacting with a retro terminal.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny sysadmin tie, hovering next to a chunky retro computer monitor displaying a blue PowerShell terminal. The monitor glows with soft lime green (#ecf874) accents. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
